name: Fudge Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer bowl, cream butter at medium speed.
2. At low speed, blend in flour, baking soda, salt, and sugar (sifted together).
3. Add 3/4 cup milk. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
4. Add eggs, melted chocolate, and remaining milk; blend.
5. Blend until well combined.
6. Scrape the bowl frequently.
7. Beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
8. At low speed, add nuts and blend well.
9. Turn batter into a greased 9 x 13 pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until done. Alternatively, bake in two 9-inch pans at 375°F for 25 minutes or until done.
11. Omit nuts if desired.
NOTE: Cocoa may be substituted for chocolate. Sift 2/3 cup cocoa with the dry ingredients.
